name: Baked Red Snapper with Ricotta Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 3-4 lb.       red snapper, striped bass or similar fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean, wash, and dry the fish.
2. Sprinkle the inside and outside of the fish with salt.
3. Prepare the stuffing by sautéing celery and onion in 1/4 cup olive oil until soft. Remove from heat and combine with the rest of the stuffing ingredients, blending well.
4. Stuff the fish loosely with the mixture. Close the opening with small skewers or toothpicks.
5. Place the fish in a well-greased baking pan.
6. Brush the fish with 2 tablespoons olive oil.
7. Bake in a pre-heated 350 degree oven for 40-60 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Baste occasionally with drippings while the fish is baking.
